description_long: This object appears to be a highly irregular, organic-shaped form with a rough, textured surface and a pale, off-white coloration. The structure is rounded on one side and features a large, hollowed-out cavity on the other, with several thin, arching extensions and openings. The surface is uneven, with some areas appearing slightly smoother and others more pitted or porous. There are no visible straight edges, corners, or flat surfaces typical of a book, and the form lacks any visible cover, spine, or pages. The overall appearance is more reminiscent of a natural object, such as a bone or shell, rather than a manufactured item. No decorative elements, illustrations, or text are visible on any surface.
description: An irregular, pale, organic-shaped object with a rough, textured surface and large hollowed cavity, lacking any visible book features.
description_view_0: Rounded, dome-like surface with subtle texture and no visible openings or features.
description_view_1: Large hollow cavity and arching extensions are visible, showing the object's internal structure.
description_view_2: Elongated view of the hollow cavity, with the object's thin extensions and rough surface prominent.
description_view_3: Side profile highlights the arching, organic extensions and the uneven, porous surface.
